toolchain.note: Recorded so a future failure can be attributed. The host HBDK and the board HBRT must match; 3.7.0 host pairs with 4.0.5 board.

measured.note: Measured on S100P with the crop-calibrated build. Latency is from hrt_model_exec perf on a quiet board — a board with a crashed process leaking VPU/BPU resources reports substantially worse until reboot.

rejected_builds.name: int8 (all)
rejected_builds.why: Fast, and wrong: ~1px systematic disparity offset plus speckle. soft-argmax accumulates softmax quantisation error rather than cancelling it.

rejected_builds.name: mixed precision (cost volume + head int16)
rejected_builds.why: The counter-intuitive one. Scattered int8/int16 boundaries make requant dominate: 6x SLOWER than quantising everything to int16, for worse accuracy.
